query:
INSERT INTO rule_node_state (
                id, created_time, rule_node_id, entity_type, entity_id, state_data
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (rule_node_id, entity_id) DO UPDATE SET
                entity_type = EXCLUDED.entity_type,
                state_data  = EXCLUDED.state_data
